messages.subject: The R Journal, Volume 7, Issue 1
messages.body_plain:
Dear all,

The latest issue of The R Journal is now available at
http://journal.r-project.org/archive/2015-1/

Many thanks to all contributors.

Regards,
Bettina

--

messages.subject: Release of R 3.2.2 scheduled for August 14
messages.subject_clean: Release of R 3.2.2 scheduled for August 14
messages.body_plain:
We intend to have a patch release on August 14, nickname will be "Fire Safety". The detailed schedule will be made available via developer.r-project.org as usual.

-- 
Peter Dalgaard, Professor,
Center for Statistics, Copenhagen Business School
Solbjerg Plads 3, 2000 Frederiksberg, Denmark
Phone: (+45)38153501
Office: A 4.23
Email: pd.mes at cbs.dk  Priv: PDalgd at gmail.com
